summary: Joel Spolsky shares a brief announcement about the upcoming Business of Software Conference. He links to Neil Davidson's preliminary speaker list, which includes Joel himself alongside notable figures like Richard Stallman, Jason Fried, and Eric Sink. The post is essentially a quick promotional note with no substantive argument or analysis.
key_points: The Business of Software Conference speaker lineup includes Joel Spolsky, Eric Sink, Richard Stallman, Dharmesh Shah, Jason Fried, Steve Johnson, and Paul Kenny
The post is a brief promotional announcement linking to Neil Davidson's blog for details
money_quotes: So far I've lined up (in no particular order) Joel Spolsky, Eric Sink, Richard Stallman, Dharmesh Shah, Jason Fried, Steve Johnson and Paul Kenny.
key_insight: A brief promotional post announcing the speaker lineup for the 2008 Business of Software Conference.
